2340980.name: Project Colored Mountains
2340980.description:
Project Colored Mountains is a cozy and colorful 3D platformer starring a bouncy little robot on a lighthearted journey through surreal and playful spaces.

Stretch yourself while launching yourself across buildings and bouncing off glowing blocks in a relaxing world that invites exploration over combat. It’s just you and a world full of strange, deserted places to discover.

At the heart of Project Colored Mountains is its movement system. You’ll unlock new abilities as you go, allowing your robot to:

  • Bounce in midair

  • Roll at high speeds 

  • Chain jumps and boosts to move with precision

Each move is designed to feel satisfying on its own and even better when combined. Whether you're hopping across a sunny field or bouncing through a flooded school hallway, the controls are smooth and intuitive, designed to reward creative play.

GIF of midair bounce combo goes here

The environments in Project Colored Mountains are quiet, surreal, and slightly magical. Every area is filled with hidden nooks, secret entrances, optional challenges, and playful environmental details. Some locations include:

  • A quiet, peaceful field, to explore at your own pace

  • A silent school, full of secrets

  • A children’s museum, with oversized exhibits and impossible rooms

  • And more!

 GIF of traversal

Each area introduces new types of blocks that change how you interact with the world. Uses of these odd cubes include:

  • Switching your gravity

  • Teleporting you across huge distances as well as tiny ones

  • Making your jumps huge!

  • Spawning something in

    And more

GIF of blocks: jump pads, teleporters, gravity shifts, etc.

While the game keeps things light and relaxing, there’s still a sense of progression and reward. You’ll:

  • Unlock new areas by completing levels

  • Collect light shards

  • Discover gems that temporarily enhance your movement

  • Revisit earlier locations with new abilities to find what you missed

Each level is self-contained, but they’re all part of a larger connected world - one that slowly reveals a mysterious event that changed everything.

GIF of unlocking a world

  • Smooth and satisfying platforming controls

  • A relaxed, story-light experience with no enemies

  • Bright, surreal levels that reward curiosity

  • Unlockable movement upgrades that expand your freedom

  • Dozens of secrets, power-ups, and hidden entrances

  • Ideal for both quick play sessions and deep exploration

Project Colored Mountains is perfect for people who love creative movement, hidden secrets, and gentle world building. Whether you want a challenge or just to roll around for fun, this is a world you can take at your own pace.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
